mapper.sql: id, oper_id, title, business_type, method, request_method, operator_type, oper_name, dept_name, oper_url, oper_ip, oper_location, oper_param, json_result, error_msg, oper_time, cost_time, tenant_id , create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, remark, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_oper_log WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_oper_log (oper_id, title, business_type, method, request_method, operator_type, oper_name, dept_name, oper_url, oper_ip, oper_location, oper_param, json_result, status, error_msg, oper_time, cost_time, tenant_id, create_by) VALUES (#{operId}, #{title}, #{businessType}, #{method}, #{requestMethod}, #{operatorType}, #{operName}, #{deptName}, #{operUrl}, #{operIp}, #{operLocation}, #{operParam}, #{jsonResult}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{operTime}, #{costTime}, #{tenantId}, #{createBy})
